COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,227.50 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT REMMICK, MARVIN DBA RAM FINANCIAL
NOTICED MOTION SCHDULED FOR DEC. 9, 1996 AT 11:00 AM. FOLDER IS IN MELENDA'S DESK.
ORDER: THE COURT HAVING HEARD THE MOTION, READ THE THE MOVING PAPERS, AND HEARD THE ARGUMENTS OF THE PARTIES HEREBY FINDS THAT THE JUDGMENT ENTERED IN
SUCH JUDGMENT IS GRANTED AND THE RENEWAL OF THE JUDGMENT IS DENIED; AND ANY WRIT OF EXEC UPON SAID JUDGMENT IS HEREBY QUASHED & OF NO FURTHER EFFECT.
ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT SENT TO JENO GATTI RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 506377 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GATTI, JENO AS TO DEFENDANT REMMICK, MARVIN DBA RAM FINANCIAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GATTI, JENO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REMMICK, MARVIN DBA RAM FINANCIAL $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $43.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,043.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTE:2ND LETTER SENT TODAY AB.RENEWAL.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM FRANCISCO TO JENO GATTI RETURNED, UNCLAIMED.

CELRK, DO NOT ISSUE WRIT OF EXECUTION OR ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ON THIS CASE. SEE FOLDER FOR ORDER.

CONTO ORDER SIGNED BY COMM. FOR MARCH 10, 1997 AT 5:30PM IN DEPT. C.
THE ABOVE-ENTITLED CASE IS VOID, & ACCORDINGLY ORDERS THAT: (1) THE JUDGMENT IS HEREBY VACATED & SET ASIDE; (2) THE MOTION OBJECTING TO RENEWAL OF
ALL ENTRIES HAS TO BE ENTERED IN REMARKS. SYSTEM WILL NOT ALLOW OTHER ENTRIES.
NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE TO PLFT JENO GATI REMAILED TO 74 ALLSTON WAY. S.F.
CASE CONTINUED BY ORDER OF COMM TO: APRIL 30, 1997, AT 10:00 AM. PER PARTIES REQUEST.
PLFDCL:CHNG DF'S ADDR.(LAST KNWN ADDR).
